docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JESSICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, BRIAN $3,195.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.98 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,340.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
